step_1_generator.note: All 4 NEUSS_* segment mock centers are hardcoded lon values between 6.76–6.79. These place the synthetic buildings firmly inside Düsseldorf (east Rhine bank), not Neuss.
step_1_generator.output: data/buildings.parquet, data/fields/field_01-03.parquet (all MOCK_ prefixed building IDs)

step_2_no_intermediate.finding: No cluster assembly script found in scripts/, mvp_radar/, or pipeline/ that writes to output/clusters/. The cluster JSON/CSV was NOT generated by any tracked script.
step_2_no_intermediate.conclusion: The cluster feed was likely hand-assembled or generated outside the tracked pipeline as a demo-stage shortcut, using real DUS street names co-located with the mock seed coordinates.

step_3_stage6_explainer.note: Explainer is rule-based on top of mock buildings. Scores (e.g., NEUSS_SUBURBAN_01 = 0.2433) were computed from the wrong geographic seed. All segment-level scores in this CSV are DUS-derived.

segment_center_audit.actual_territory: Düsseldorf / Neuss border zone (south of Neuss, east of Rhine)
Düsseldorf — Heinrich-Heine-Universität district (Universitätsstraße, Moorenstraße, Himmelgeister Straße all confirmed DUS streets)

neuss_reference.eastern_boundary: Rhine River (~lon 6.70–6.73 at Neuss latitude). All mock centers (lon 6.76–6.79) are east of this — inside Düsseldorf.

cluster_feed_findings.data_nature: Fully synthetic mock. building_ids all prefixed MOCK_. Real DUS street names applied to fabricated coordinates by accident of seed placement.

explainer_csv_findings.reason: All opportunity_score values derived from mock buildings seeded at DUS coordinates. Scores are numerically plausible but geographically meaningless for Neuss.

requirements_for_valid_neuss_feed.coordinate_truth: All cluster centroid lat/lon must pass Neuss polygon PiP filter (boundary_status = POLYGON_PIP_OK, kept > 0)
requirements_for_valid_neuss_feed.street_attribution: Named streets must be verifiable Neuss streets (PLZ 41460–41472 or confirmed by OSM)
requirements_for_valid_neuss_feed.data_origin: Must originate from real address/building data — not MOCK_-prefixed generator output
requirements_for_valid_neuss_feed.segment_ids: NEUSS_* IDs must correspond to actual Neuss geographic zones
requirements_for_valid_neuss_feed.explainer_consistency: stage6 explainer scores must be re-derived from Neuss-validated segments only

recommended_action: REPLACE_CLUSTER_FEED_WITH_REAL_NEUSS_DATA. Source real Neuss building/address data, re-seed cluster generation with correct Neuss PLZ + boundary polygon, re-run stage6 explainer, re-run boundary filter to confirm clean.
false_fix_warnings: Do NOT loosen the polygon boundary to include DUS-side streets
Do NOT replace polygon PiP with PLZ-only filtering as primary truth
Do NOT manually blacklist DUS street names as a shortcut
Do NOT weaken fail-closed behavior in UI — radar must remain BLOCKED until kept > 0
